final_prompt.prompt:
Create a vertical short-video cover for an 8K GGU gaming monitor launch.

Style/medium: needs a "极简高级感" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Swiss International Typographic Style, 原研哉 / MUJI brand identity heritage, Dieter Rams' product design philosophy; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must use rule-of-thirds (三分线构图) with large headline as dominant focal point
Subject: must include the 8K GGU gaming monitor as the product hero
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: needs a premium, refined direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz" (large, primary headline), "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩" (secondary tagline)
Constraints: must be vertical short-video cover format, headline must be eye-catching and dominant
Avoid:
